summary: Multi-league context bug fix verified. Rankings screen correctly removed horizontal league tabs and now uses single league header from LeagueContext.activeLeague. Home league switcher dropdown works correctly for switching between leagues.
critical_code_review_comments: Rankings screen correctly shows single league header with trophy icon + activeLeague.name (singleLeagueHeader style)
NO horizontal scrollable league chips/tabs on Rankings - bug is fixed
Home league switcher dropdown ('Cambia Lega') works correctly - shows all user leagues with trophy icons
LeagueContext.activeLeague is properly used as source of truth for both Home and Rankings
Home correctly resets data/countdown when activeLeague changes (via useEffect on activeLeague?.id)
Rankings correctly fetches standings for activeLeague.id when league changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-league context bug fix is complete. User ilio@raimondi.it has multiple leagues. On Home screen: league switcher dropdown shows all leagues with 'Cambia Lega' title. On Rankings screen: shows single league header with trophy + activeLeague.name (NO horizontal scrollable league chips). Rankings uses LeagueContext.activeLeague for data fetching. When user switches leagues on Home, Rankings correctly updates to show new league standings.

home_league_switcher.details: League dropdown shows 'Cambia Lega' title, lists all user leagues with trophy icons, highlights current league with checkmark

home_league_data_scoping.details: Home shows league-scoped data (matchday, performance, rankings preview) for activeLeague

rankings_single_league_header.details: Rankings shows single league header with trophy icon + league name (singleLeagueHeader style)

rankings_no_multi_league_tabs.details: NO horizontal scrollable league chips/tabs on Rankings screen - bug fixed

rankings_total_weekly_tabs.details: Total/Weekly tabs visible and functional on Rankings

league_context_sync.details: When league switched on Home, Rankings correctly updates to show new league data

verification_screenshots: Rankings screen showing 'Rankings' header + trophy + 'liga2' + Total/Weekly tabs + standings list
Home screen showing league switcher with 'Cambia Lega' dropdown listing all leagues
Rankings after league switch showing 'Lega Nazionale FantaPronostic'
